name: A Comparative Evaluation of Embeddings and LLMs in a Greek Book Publisher Setting - The CUP Dataset
summary: arXiv:2607.21274v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present CUP, a Greek book retrieval benchmark consisting of 868 catalog records and 104 expert-annotated queries with graded relevance judgments...
description: arXiv:2607.21274v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present CUP, a Greek book retrieval benchmark consisting of 868 catalog records and 104 expert-annotated queries with graded relevance judgments. We evaluate sparse (BM25), dense (sentence-transformers), hybrid, and LLM-assisted retrieval methods in this book-search setting. Multilingual embeddings outperform Greek-specific models, while hybr...
author: Katerina Papantoniou, Panagiotis Papadakos, Theodore Patkos, Dimitris Garefalakis, Nikos Vardakis, Dimitris Plexousakis
